blocks.title: Entry Importer: Save Time on Form Migrations
blocks.content: Entry Importer lets you bring your actual form submissions into WPForms from virtually any source. Your forms are here. Now your data can be too. Import from any CSV file, or migrate directly from other WordPress form plugins.

main.url: https://wpforms.com/docs/editing-forms-with-wpforms-ai/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Entry Importer Upgrade Now Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/introducing-wpforms-v1-10-1/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Entry Importer Learn More Lite

blocks.title: Smart Edit With AI
blocks.content: Now you can edit any existing form using plain, conversational language from a chat box right inside the form builder. Add, remove, and reorder fields. Update field properties and form settings. Build and modify conditional logic. Configure email notifications, and more!

main.url: https://wpforms.com/docs/editing-forms-with-wpforms-ai/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Smart Edit With AI Try It Out Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/introducing-wpforms-v1-10-1/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Smart Edit With AI Learn More Lite

blocks.title: Improved Surveys & Polls Reports
blocks.content: Completely redesigned, the Surveys & Polls reporting now features an advanced filter system with saveable presets, customizable graph styles for a personalized view, and multiple export options alongside tailored print layouts.

main.url: https://wpforms.com/wpforms-lite-upgrade/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Improved Surveys & Polls Reports Upgrade Now Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/announcing-surveys-polls-reimagined-reporting/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Improved Surveys & Polls Reports Learn More Lite

blocks.title: More Ways to Pay, More Reasons to Stay: PayPal for All
blocks.content: PayPal is now available to everyone, with an expanded integration that adds Pay Later, Google Pay, Apple Pay, Venmo, Fastlane accelerated checkout, and regional payment methods alongside standard PayPal and card payments.

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/announcing-paypal-for-all-users/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=PayPal for All Learn More Lite

blocks.title: Drop a Pin With the Map Field
blocks.content: Give visitors a better way to choose a location. The Map field embeds an interactive map directly in your form, with pins for each of your locations. Visitors can browse the map, click pins for details, and select a location, all without leaving the form.

main.url: https://wpforms.com/wpforms-lite-upgrade/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Map Field Upgrade Now Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/announcing-map-field/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Map Field Learn More Lite

blocks.title: Build Engaging Quizzes in Seconds
blocks.content: Generate complete quizzes with conditional logic using simple prompts. Start from scratch or choose from 50+ quiz templates designed to engage your audience. Building powerful quizzes has never been easier.

main.url: https://wpforms.com/wpforms-lite-upgrade/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Quiz Addon Upgrade Now Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/announcing-quiz-addon/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Quiz Addon Learn More Lite

blocks.title: More Great Workflow Automation Tools
blocks.content: Build databases with Airtable and Notion, or use n8n to create complex workflows that integrate with your favorite services.

main.url: https://wpforms.com/wpforms-lite-upgrade/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Automation Tools Upgrade Now Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/integrations/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Automation Tools Learn More Lite

blocks.title: Skip the Upload, Just Record
blocks.content: Allow your customers to take a photo or record a video in real time using their mobile device or webcam. Whether you use the new Camera field or the updated File Upload field, capturing visual information is now faster and easier than ever.

main.url: https://wpforms.com/wpforms-lite-upgrade/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Camera Field Upgrade Now Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/announcing-camera-field/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Camera Field Learn More Lite

blocks.title: PDF Addon: Everything You Asked For (and then some)
blocks.content: Attach a PDF to entries or create documents, invoices, certificates, and more with over a dozen fully customizable templates to choose from.

main.url: https://wpforms.com/wpforms-lite-upgrade/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=PDF Addon Upgrade Now Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/announcing-pdf-addon/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=PDF Addon Learn More Lite

blocks.title: Form Themes For Everyone
blocks.content: Change colors, backgrounds, and borders with native controls. With full support for the Block Editor, Elementor, and now in our very own Form Builder, you can easily style your form no matter how you manage your site.

main.url: https://wpforms.com/docs/styling-your-forms?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Form Themes Try It Out Lite

alt.url: https://wpforms.com/announcing-form-themes-for-all/?utm_source=WordPress&utm_campaign=liteplugin&utm_medium=Whats New Splash&utm_content=Form Themes Learn More Lite
